metadata.description: A collection of agentic AI tools: hooks, skills, and agents for Claude Code

plugins.name: plan-critique
plugins.description: Parallel critique system — spawns Opus + Codex reviewers for plan files

plugins.name: ab-code-review
plugins.description: Parallel code review — spawns Opus + Codex to review your branch diff against main

plugins.name: onboardme
plugins.description: Onboarding one-pager — traces one real request end to end to make an unfamiliar codebase picturable in about three minutes

plugins.name: pr-test-reviewer
plugins.description: Test-focused PR review — grades tests present, flags testability changes worth making, and suggests the highest-value missing tests for the touched code

plugins.name: test-plan-explorer
plugins.description: Risk-prioritized test plan for under-tested code — decides what is worth testing and why, produces a reviewable plan before any tests are written

plugins.name: dev-doctor
plugins.description: Read-only local environment preflight — inspects git/worktree state, runtimes, Docker/Compose identity, ports, volumes, and env files, then writes a report the agent reads before changing code
